rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GLORIA S. STEVENS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Proceeding To Be Continued By Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. On July 13, 2021, Richard Stevens, as Trustee of the Gloria Stevens Trust, filed Petition for Order Determining Trust's Title to Real Property. Richard Stevens filed a Supplement to Petition on March 15, 2022. Richard Stevens died on May 4, 2022. William A. Stevens became the successor trustee of the Trust, pursuant to the Trust instrument. On June 16, 2022, William A. Stevens filed the instant Motion for Proceeding to be Continued by Successor Trustee. No opposition has been filed. William A. Stevens has brought this motion under Code of Civil Procedure section 377.31. It asks for "an order allowing this proceeding to be continued by William A. Stevens, successor trustee of the Trust, and for such other and further relief as the court may deem proper." (MPA, 3:1-3.) The Motion for Proceeding to be Continued by Successor Trustee is DENIED. Code of Civil Procedure section 377.31 is inapplicable here. A successor trustee can continue a legal action brought by his predecessor as a function of the fiduciary position (See, Probate Code sections 15643, 15660, 16010, 16080). Because Richard Stevens filed the underlying Petition solely in his capacity as Trustee of the Gloria S. Stevens Trust, dated December 26, 1992, William A. Stevens is free, as a successor trustee, to continue to prosecute the Petition without the necessity of a court order. Petitioner shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling as published above. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. Remote appearance is available in conformity with the current General Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division, available on the court's website at https://sfsuperiorcourt.org/divisions/probate. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 87580177925 and passcode 722809. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
